creator: greglmiller@gmail.com
text:
Starting with 9.1-BETA1, I'm no longer able to mount my flash drive (the device entry for the partition never shows up). I get the following when plugging it in:

ugen0.3: <PNY> at usbus0
umass2: <PNY USB 2.0 FD, class 0/0, rev 2.00/2.00, addr 3> on usbus0
umass2:  SCSI over Bulk-Only; quirks = 0x4100
umass2:5:2:-1: Attached to scbus5
da2 at umass-sim2 bus 2 scbus5 target 0 lun 0
da2: <PNY USB 2.0 FD 8.02> Removable Direct Access SCSI-0 device 
da2: 40.000MB/s transfers
da2: Attempt to query device size failed: UNIT ATTENTION, Medium not present

This was working with 9.0p3 on the same machine.

How-To-Repeat: Plug in the PNY Mini Attache flash drive.
